case_title: SMITH, LINDA D.(FOR: J.R. VALREY-SMITH) VS DINES, JAMES MR.

docket_entries.description: SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF MAR-09-1993, GRANTED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SMITH, LINDA D.(FOR: J.R. VALREY-SMITH) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DINES, JAMES MR. $2,340.00 PRINCIPAL, $116.00 INTEREST, $36.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,492.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
